{{Quote|Watchful rebel guards in this region are trying to recruit the locals into the Rebellion. We need to show everyone what happens to those who oppose the Emperor.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to an Imperial spacer|<ref name="SWG:OS" />}}
'''Operation Sieve''' was one of the small operations that were led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] against the increasing activity of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]],<ref name="SWG:OS" /> in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the Rebel Alliance struggled for the control of several cities in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During periods of Imperial occupation of the cities of [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]], [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] or [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], Darth Vader landed in these three capital cities aboard his [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|''ST 321'']]. Accompanied by a group of [[Triumphant-class dark trooper]]s, the Sith Lord attempted to rally support for the Imperial cause and recruit troops for dangerous missions against the Rebellion. Vader recruited a group of skillful spacers affiliated with the Galactic Empire to hunt down military forces of the Rebellion. The spacers subsequently traveled in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and killed twenty-five Rebel guardsmen in Alliance-controlled cities.<ref name="SWG:OS" /> The successful Imperial spacers were later assigned to [[Operation Lumberjack]].<ref name="SWG:OL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Operation Sieve appeared as a quest in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:OS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The quest was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 19 Notes for 29 June 2005|Publish 19]]," on [[June 29]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Update Notes: Publish 19.0 - June 29th, 2005">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=swgpatchnotes&message.id=757|text=Update Notes: Publish 19.0 - June 29th, 2005}}</ref>

During periods of Imperial [[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Planetary control game|occupation]] of the cities of Bestine, Coronet or Theed, Darth Vader would periodically land in these cities. Vader would offer players of the Imperial [[W:c:swg:Faction|faction]] up to eight different [[W:c:swg:Quest|quests]], half of which were designated as "[[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Combatant|Combatant]]" quests (to be carried out against Rebel non-player characters), and the other half of which were designated as "[[W:c:swg:Galactic Civil War#Special Forces|Special Forces]]" quests (to be carried out against Rebel-aligned players). Operation Sieve was the second of the four Imperial Combatant missions that players received from Darth Vader. The player had to kill 25 rebel NPCs named "a watchful Rebel guard" and received 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and 500 imperial faction points as reward.<ref name="SWG:OS" />
